TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Vungalid, title = Vungalid, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Vungalid} }

S.FORM: alang Vungalid ga niya mki sku Heto Keng atu Laygi go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 304 buwan, 1,067 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 97% kyan ku 1,032 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 3% kyan ku 35 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Paywan94%, binah lihuyan s'uli 2%. rhzyal kki'an tay mkraya' na Vungalid hya' ga Pucunug. tay mkyahu' na Vungalid hya' ga Payljus. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 2 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh

alang Vungalid ga niya mki sku Heto Keng atu Laygi go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 304 buwan, 1,067 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 97% kyan ku 1,032 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 3% kyan ku 35 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Paywan94%, binah lihuyan s'uli 2%. rhzyal kki'an tay mkraya' na Vungalid hya' ga Pucunug. tay mkyahu' na Vungalid hya' ga Payljus. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 2 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ *uŋali* ɣa nija mki s~ɕku ħeto keŋ atu lajɣi ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *,*** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *,*** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, pajwan**%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. rħzjal kkiʔan taj mkrajaʔ na *uŋali* ħjaʔ ɣa puʦ~ʨunuɣ. taj mkjaħuʔ na *uŋali* ħjaʔ ɣa pajljus~ɕ. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj. pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
